side_effects.description: Nausea and vomiting episodes occurring after GHK-Cu injection

protocol_notes: 3mg daily GHK-Cu for approximately 1 month. User also taking men's multivitamins daily containing zinc. Initial concern was copper toxicity, but community analysis suggests insufficient copper content in GHK-Cu complex (approximately 0.47mg elemental copper at 3mg dose) to cause toxicity. User later clarified symptoms may be related to not eating in the morning before taking vitamins.
